name: Toji and Shiu - JJK
description:
Sorcerers are nothing but troublemakers. At least, that’s what they keep telling you. ❀

RPG bot with the characters Shiu Kong and Toji Fushiguro from the anime Jujutsu Kaisen. (˶˃ ᵕ ˂˶)

A scenario where Shiu and his reckless friend Toji try to convince you not to become a sorcerer at Jujutsu Tech. Maybe they’re just being overprotective, or maybe they’re just being douchebags, but things become difficult when the staff at Jujutsu Tech find out about their plans.
creator: Sara_cringeee
